message:
Add TUI speculation display and TTY transcript control frame support

TUI and TTY audio module changes to support speculative transcript
visualization and structured transcript control frames:

tui.rs:
- Add speculation_stats_line() method to LiveTranscriptionView that
  renders a [SPEC] status line showing correction count and rate
  (returns empty string when speculative mode is inactive)
- Add set_speculative(), push_speculative_segment(),
  push_correction(), retract_segments(), confirm_segments() methods
  for managing speculative segment lifecycle in the TUI
- Add SegmentCorrectionState enum (Original, Speculative, Retracted,
  Corrected, Confirmed) with correction_prefix() rendering:
  "~ " for speculative, "x " for retracted, "> " for corrected
- Add segment_correction_state() accessor for test inspection
- Add render_speaker_colored_line edge-case tests for missing
  end timestamps (Some(start), None -> "-> ???") and fully missing
  timestamps (None, None -> "??:??:??.???")
- Add export_plain_text test for None-timestamp segment handling

tty_audio.rs:
- Clamp frame_loss_rate to [0.0, 1.0] in AdaptiveBitrateController
  to prevent ratio > 1.0 when frames_lost > frames_sent due to
  accounting race conditions
- Add TranscriptSegmentCompact struct with From<&TranscriptionSegment>
  conversion using compact field names (s, e, t, sp, c) with
  skip_serializing_if for optional fields
- Add TtyControlFrame::TranscriptPartial variant with seq, window_id,
  segments, model_id, and speculative fields
- Add TtyControlFrame::TranscriptRetract variant with retracted_seq,
  window_id, and reason fields
- Add emit_tty_transcript_partial() and emit_tty_transcript_retract()
  writer functions for NDJSON line emission
- Add TRANSCRIPT_PROTOCOL_VERSION constant
- Add TranscriptSegmentCompact conversion tests verifying None speaker/
  confidence fields are omitted from JSON via skip_serializing_if
- Add TranscriptPartial frame serde round-trip test
- Add emit_tty_transcript_partial NDJSON correctness test
- Add emit_tty_transcript_retract NDJSON correctness test
- Add retransmit_plan_from_reader gap identification test
- Update test imports for new public APIs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
